name: ct-protocol
note: AGPL-3.0-only (Copyright (C) 2026 coolwhite LLC). The cross-platform shared Rust crate every client (current macOS, future iOS / Android / Windows / Linux desktop) and the server depend on for profile parsing, subscription manifests, the wire format, and the component model. no_std-friendly, zero-unsafe, zero-IO. The server is the canonical source of this crate; clients pull a matching version via Cargo.lock.
